title: leucanthemum tenuifolium
intro: Leucanthemum tenuifolium, also known as the narrow-leaved oxeye daisy, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The narrow-leaved oxeye daisy is valued for its health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in the treatment of skin conditions. Leucanthemum tenuifolium can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and its leaves and flowers can be used in salads or as a garnish.
